# Rot Report

> Daily rot and decay content for entertainment, humor, and morbid curiosity.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://rot.csskey.com/)
- [About](https://rot.csskey.com/about)
- [Privacy Policy](https://rot.csskey.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://rot.csskey.com/terms)
- [Contact](https://rot.csskey.com/contact)

## Features
- Daily rot content
- Decay tracker
- Humor content
- Morbid facts
- Entertainment
